arts.ttl: Germany U21 vs England U21 preview: Team news & predicted lineups – U21 Euros 2025
arts.sum: A day after a memorable 5-5 draw between the U19 sides, Germany and England will face off in the U21 Euros for a top spot in the group stage.

arts.ttl: Germany U21 predicted XI versus England U21
arts.sum: Germany will look to secure top spot in Group B with a win against defending champions England in the under-21 EUROS. In their first two group games, Germany put in…
